insights.summary: The weather in Nairobi shows a mix of conditions. The next few days feature moderate temperatures with some rainfall expected mid-week. The best time for outdoor activities is Monday morning, with clear skies and comfortable temperatures around 18°C.

agronomic_context.crop_friendliness: Good for most crops but monitor rainfall levels
agronomic_context.pest_risk: Moderate - humid conditions may encourage fungal growth

risk_flags.description: Heavy rain expected on Wednesday. Protect young plants.

recommendations: Apply fungicides before Wednesday to prevent infection
Irrigate lightly on Monday to prepare for dry spell
Delay planting until Thursday when conditions stabilize
